shortDesc: MINIGAME
fullDesc: Each player creates ten Treasures, then exiles the top card of their library face down. Starting with the active player, reveal that player's exiled card, then all players secretly bid a number of Treasures (players may not bid more Treasures than they control). Reveal all numbers simultaneously. The player with the highest number sacrifices that many Treasures and puts the card face down on top of their library. If there is a tie, no Treasures are sacrificed and the card is put on the bottom of its owner's library. Repeat this for each card exiled this way.

shortDesc: MINIGAME
fullDesc:
Each player antes an amount of life. Each player reveals cards from the top of their library until they reveal a card with a collector number. Using the numbers on each card (they can be rearranged), compare with the following ranking:
Full sequence (every number is in a sequence)
All same (every number is the same)
Two pair
One pair
High number
The player with the highest ranked collector number gains the ante'd life.

fullDesc: Each player reveals the top three cards of their library then designs a meal: one card is the protein, one is the side, and one is the sauce. Once each chef has described their menu, each player secretly votes for whichever meal they'd like to eat. The winner creates three Treasure tokens. Each player who voted for the winner creates a Food token.
